# Formax Builders

> Premium construction company in Kerala, India (established 2017) — a full-service builder and developer delivering residential, commercial and infrastructure projects from foundation to finish across Thrissur, Kochi, Palakkad and Malappuram. Licensed, bonded & insured.

Formax Builders ("Formax Builders and Developers") handles the entire build under one accountable team: architectural planning, house building, commercial construction, renovation & remodeling, landscaping, interior design, electrical, plumbing and project management.

## Service Areas
- Thrissur, Kerala (base)
- Kochi / Ernakulam, Kerala
- Palakkad, Kerala
- Malappuram, Kerala

## Contact
- Email: formaxbuilders@gmail.com
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 99952 38832
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/formaxbuilders
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61590441039128
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/formax-builders-b105b5414/
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@formaxbuilders

## Services
- House Building — complete custom homes from foundation to roof.
- Landscaping — garden design, hardscaping, irrigation, outdoor lighting.
- Architectural Planning — concept to construction drawings, permits, 3D visualisation.
- Interior Design — space planning, materials, custom joinery, styling.
- Electrical Services — wiring, panels, smart-home automation, certification.
- Plumbing Solutions — water supply, drainage, fixtures, leak detection.
- Renovation & Remodeling — kitchens, baths, extensions, heritage restoration.
- Project Management — budgeting, scheduling, procurement, safety and QA/QC.

## Design Styles We Build
- Box-Model / Minimalist — clean lines, honest materials, restrained palette.
- Fusion / Traditional Hybrid — heritage craftsmanship with modern comfort.
- Tropical Contemporary — open, breezy, light-filled, indoor-outdoor living.

## Credentials
- Established 2017; licensed, bonded & insured.
- 500+ projects completed, 98% safety rating, 150+ team members.
- Certifications: LEED, OSHA, ISO 9001, BBB A+.
